name: bdd-test-executor
description: Parse and execute BDD Gherkin feature files against web applications using Playwright MCP. Captures full stack traces, console errors, and screenshots on failure. Generates a self-contained interactive HTML dashboard with feature-wise results and a consolidated failures view.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — Gherkin BDD parsing, Playwright MCP execution, failure stack trace capture, screenshot on failure, interactive HTML dashboard with Summary/Features/Tags/Failures tabs, feature folder auto-scan hook
